format.description: Image format we want to use for this assets's mutations

quality.description: Quality percentage for this image mutation

mips.description: Whether to generate a full mip chain. Applies to GPU-compressed formats (BC7/ASTC/ETC2).

astcBlockSize.description: ASTC block-size index when format == astc. 0=4x4, 1=6x6, 2=8x8, 3=12x12. Ignored for non-ASTC formats.
